gaps: No test covers the scenario where Find My Device dialog repeatedly pops up each time the user navigates to the Find My Device settings screen after location was denied during onboarding (the 'repeated dialog loop' behavior).

No test verifies that dismissing the Find My Device dialog (by tapping outside or pressing Back) does not permanently suppress the dialog — i.e., the dialog reappears on subsequent visits to the Find My Device screen until location permission is actually granted.

No test covers the resolution path: granting location permission via Android Settings (Allow all the time or Allow only while using the app) and then verifying the Find My Device dialog no longer appears on return visits.
No test covers the specific navigation flow: Home → Settings (gear icon) → Find My Device as the trigger path for the repeated dialog issue.

generated_testcases.title: TC-FMD-001: Find My Device dialog reappears after dismissing via Back button when location was denied during onboarding
steps: Launch Poly Studio Mobile app on a fresh install (or clear app data).
Complete onboarding flow but DENY location permission when prompted (tap 'Deny' or 'Don't Allow').
Once on the Home screen, tap the Settings (gear) icon in the top-right corner.
Tap 'Find My Device' from the Settings menu.
Observe the Find My Device location permission dialog appears.
Tap the Back button (or swipe back) to dismiss the dialog without granting permission.
Navigate back to Home by tapping the back arrow or Home button.
Repeat Step 3: Tap the Settings (gear) icon again.
Repeat Step 4: Tap 'Find My Device' again.
Verify the Find My Device location permission dialog appears again (dialog is NOT permanently suppressed).
Repeat steps 6-10 for a total of 3 consecutive attempts.
Verify the dialog appears every single time without fail.
generated_testcases.expected: The Find My Device location permission dialog reappears each time the user navigates to the Find My Device screen after dismissing it via Back, regardless of how many times it has been dismissed previously.

generated_testcases.title: TC-FMD-002: Find My Device dialog reappears after tapping outside dialog when location was denied during onboarding
steps: Launch Poly Studio Mobile app on a fresh install (or clear app data).
Complete onboarding flow but DENY location permission when prompted (tap 'Deny' or 'Don't Allow').
Once on the Home screen, tap the Settings (gear) icon in the top-right corner.
Tap 'Find My Device' from the Settings menu.
Observe the Find My Device location permission dialog appears.
Tap outside the dialog (on the dimmed background area) to dismiss it.
Navigate back to Home by tapping the back arrow or Home button.
Repeat Step 3: Tap the Settings (gear) icon again.
Repeat Step 4: Tap 'Find My Device' again.
Verify the Find My Device location permission dialog appears again.
Repeat steps 6-10 for a total of 3 consecutive attempts.
Verify the dialog appears every single time without fail.
generated_testcases.expected: The Find My Device location permission dialog reappears each time the user navigates to the Find My Device screen after dismissing it by tapping outside, regardless of how many times it has been dismissed previously.

generated_testcases.title: TC-FMD-003: Find My Device dialog reappears after app restart when location was denied during onboarding
steps: Launch Poly Studio Mobile app on a fresh install (or clear app data).
Complete onboarding flow but DENY location permission when prompted (tap 'Deny' or 'Don't Allow').
Once on the Home screen, tap the Settings (gear) icon in the top-right corner.
Tap 'Find My Device' from the Settings menu.
Observe the Find My Device location permission dialog appears.
Tap the Back button to dismiss the dialog.
Press the Home button to background the app, then force-kill the app (swipe it away from Recents).
Re-launch Poly Studio Mobile app.
Navigate: Home → Settings (gear icon) → Find My Device.
Verify the Find My Device location permission dialog appears again.
generated_testcases.expected: The Find My Device location permission dialog reappears after the app is force-killed and relaunched, confirming the dialog state is not permanently stored when dismissed without granting permission.

generated_testcases.title: TC-FMD-004: Grant 'Allow only while using the app' location permission resolves the Find My Device dialog loop
steps: Launch Poly Studio Mobile app on a fresh install (or clear app data).
Complete onboarding flow but DENY location permission when prompted (tap 'Deny' or 'Don't Allow').
Once on the Home screen, tap the Settings (gear) icon in the top-right corner.
Tap 'Find My Device' from the Settings menu.
Observe the Find My Device location permission dialog appears.
Tap the Back button to dismiss the dialog.
Navigate to Android System Settings → Apps → Poly Studio Mobile → Permissions.
Tap 'Location' and select 'Allow only while using the app'.
Return to the Poly Studio Mobile app.
Navigate: Home → Settings (gear icon) → Find My Device.
Verify the Find My Device location permission dialog does NOT appear.
Verify the Find My Device screen loads successfully with its content (e.g., device location map or status).
Navigate away to Home, then return to Settings → Find My Device two more times.
Verify the dialog never reappears.
generated_testcases.expected: After granting 'Allow only while using the app' location permission via Android Settings, the Find My Device dialog no longer appears on any subsequent visit to the Find My Device screen.

generated_testcases.title: TC-FMD-005: Grant 'Allow all the time' location permission resolves the Find My Device dialog loop
steps: Launch Poly Studio Mobile app on a fresh install (or clear app data).
Complete onboarding flow but DENY location permission when prompted (tap 'Deny' or 'Don't Allow').
Once on the Home screen, tap the Settings (gear) icon in the top-right corner.
Tap 'Find My Device' from the Settings menu.
Observe the Find My Device location permission dialog appears.
Tap the Back button to dismiss the dialog.
Navigate to Android System Settings → Apps → Poly Studio Mobile → Permissions.
Tap 'Location' and select 'Allow all the time'.
Return to the Poly Studio Mobile app.
Navigate: Home → Settings (gear icon) → Find My Device.
Verify the Find My Device location permission dialog does NOT appear.
Verify the Find My Device screen loads successfully with its content.
Navigate away to Home, then return to Settings → Find My Device two more times.
Verify the dialog never reappears.
generated_testcases.expected: After granting 'Allow all the time' location permission via Android Settings, the Find My Device dialog no longer appears on any subsequent visit to the Find My Device screen.

generated_testcases.title: TC-FMD-006: Find My Device dialog loop persists after granting then revoking location permission
steps: Launch Poly Studio Mobile app on a fresh install (or clear app data).
Complete onboarding flow but DENY location permission when prompted.
Navigate to Android System Settings → Apps → Poly Studio Mobile → Permissions.
Tap 'Location' and select 'Allow only while using the app'.
Return to the app and navigate: Home → Settings (gear icon) → Find My Device.
Verify the dialog does NOT appear (permission is granted).
Navigate away to Home.
Go to Android System Settings → Apps → Poly Studio Mobile → Permissions.
Tap 'Location' and select 'Deny'.
Return to the Poly Studio Mobile app.
Navigate: Home → Settings (gear icon) → Find My Device.
Verify the Find My Device location permission dialog appears again (the loop resumes after permission is revoked).
Dismiss the dialog via Back button.
Navigate away and return to Find My Device two more times.
Verify the dialog appears each time.
generated_testcases.expected: After location permission is granted and then revoked again, the Find My Device dialog loop resumes — the dialog reappears on every visit to the Find My Device screen and is not permanently suppressed.

generated_testcases.title: TC-FMD-007: Find My Device dialog appears via all navigation paths when location is denied
steps: Launch Poly Studio Mobile app on a fresh install (or clear app data).
Complete onboarding flow but DENY location permission when prompted.
Test Navigation Path 1: Home → Settings (gear icon) → Find My Device.
Verify the Find My Device location permission dialog appears.
Dismiss via Back button.
Test Navigation Path 2: Home → tap [Device Name] → Device Settings → scroll to Find My Device → tap.
Verify the Find My Device location permission dialog appears.
Dismiss via Back button.
Test Navigation Path 3: Home → hamburger menu (3 lines) → Find My Device (if available in drawer).
Verify the Find My Device location permission dialog appears (if this path exists).
Dismiss via Back button.
Verify that all navigation paths trigger the dialog consistently.
generated_testcases.expected: The Find My Device location permission dialog appears regardless of which navigation path the user takes to reach the Find My Device screen, when location permission was denied during onboarding.
